title: Linux Sudoers File Modification
description: Detects modifications to the sudoers file or files in sudoers.d directory. Attackers modify sudoers to escalate privileges or maintain persistent elevated access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*visudo*' or msg like '*/etc/sudoers*' or msg like '*/etc/sudoers.d/*')))
